use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials with engaging typewriter text animation effect
Adding interactive audio testimonials that play automatically on hover
Showcasing social proof with multimedia testimonials on landing pages
Creating dynamic testimonial sections with smooth Framer Motion transitions
Building testimonial galleries with image, audio, text, and metadata display
ai_summary: A testimonial display component featuring typewriter text animation that reveals quotes character-by-character on hover, combined with audio playback functionality. Built with React, Framer Motion, and HTML5 Audio API to create an engaging, multimedia testimonial experience. Supports multiple testimonials with smooth transitions and interactive audio-visual elements for enhanced social proof presentations.
